envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Reviews are PROPOSED_NOT_REVIEWED. Admin decisions land at D5 Starter Envelope Assembly + D6 Activation. No runtime activation at D4.

items.name: Company Map Governance Review
items.description: Surfaces D3 Company Map recommendation regions for admin governance review with explicit approval_chain + dual_control + escalation_path per region. Initial-rollout departments + sensitive-systems exclusion + compliance posture summary each carry distinct admin_approval_required flags.
items.human_readable_summary: Admin walks each Company Map region and decides APPROVE / APPROVE_WITH_CONDITIONS / DEFER_FOR_MORE_INFO / REJECT / ESCALATE_TO_FOUNDER. Sensitive-systems exclusion is absolute regardless of admin choice.
items.model_usage_notes: Initial-rollout departments require Otzar Administrator approval. Sensitive-systems exclusion is always-on (REJECT-or-stronger); admin can only restrict further, never expand. Compliance posture summary requires neutral vocabulary per ADR-0070.
escalation_path: General Counsel → Founder (ESCALATE_TO_FOUNDER for sensitive-systems modifications)
DMW_scope_implications: Approved Company Map establishes the tenant-scope ceiling for every downstream DMW scope
Sensitive-systems exclusion REJECT outcome remains absolute downstream
Initial-rollout departments approval bounds Department-scoped DMW activation
Per ADR-0037: jurisdiction approval bounds jurisdiction-aware DMW scope
governance_review_points: Admin must approve every CompanyMap region before any downstream Map activates
Sensitive-systems exclusion is REJECT-or-stronger; admin can only narrow, never expand
Compliance vocabulary must stay neutral per ADR-0070 — no claim of regulator approval or guaranteed compliance
Dual-control mandatory for sensitive-systems modifications per ADR-0026
safe_defaults: Admin policy approval at every region
